title: senecio buglossus
intro: Senecio buglossus, also known as Grecian woolly thistle, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Its leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as bronchitis, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, offering health benefits like reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Senecio buglossus can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
